zh.lifeSummary: Joan Wycliff於1522年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特維德莫。她於大約1534年與Thomas Meade VI在英國英格蘭艾可貝爾登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1557年8月28日在英國英格蘭艾可貝爾登享年35歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特維德莫。

nameMeanings.name: Wycliff

meanings: English: locative name from Wycliffe (NR Yorks).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: Joan Wycliff was born in 1522, in Wedmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. She married Thomas Meade VI about 1534, in Berden, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 28 August 1557, in Berden, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35, and was buried in Wedmore, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Wycliff est née en 1522, à Wedmore, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Thomas Meade VI environ 1534, à Berden, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 août 1557, à Berden, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Wedmore, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Joan Wycliff wurde 1522 in Wedmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 1534 in Berden, Essex, England, United Kingdom Thomas Meade VI geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. August 1557 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Berden, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wedmore, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Joan Wycliff è nata il nel 1522 nel Wedmore, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Thomas Meade VI circa 1534, nel Berden, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 28 agosto 1557, nel Berden, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Wedmore, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Wycliffは1522年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウエドモーで生まれた。約1534年にイギリスイギリスエセックスバーデンでThomas Meade VIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1557年8月28日にイギリスイギリスエセックスバーデンで35歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトウエドモーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Wycliff(은)는 1522년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 w드모어에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1534년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 버든에서 Thomas Meade VI(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 8월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 버든에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 w드모어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan Wycliff nasceu em 1522, em Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Thomas Meade VI aproximadamente 1534, em Berden, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1557, em Berden, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Wycliff родилась в 1522 г. в местности ведмор, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Meade VI около 1534 г. в местности бирден, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 28 августа 1557 г. в местности бирден, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности ведмор, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Joan Wycliff nació en 1522, en Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Thomas Meade VI aproximadamente 1534, en Berden, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1557, en Berden, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra.
